task: edu case list should not show empty training state when case loading fails

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion reporting requires requirement-to-evidence mapping, real runtime or user-facing verification, completion guard evidence, and exact residual risk reporting.
Code, deployment, UI, and customer-facing changes require real verification and completion evidence guard before reporting complete.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Do not imply training history was deleted when the cases API request fails.
requirements_checklist.evidence: harness-os/edu-app/src/App.tsx now stores listCases failures in casesError instead of silently treating failures as an empty list.

requirements_checklist.requirement: The case selection screen should show a loading/error state separately from the true no-cases state.
requirements_checklist.evidence: harness-os/edu-app/src/components/CaseSelectScreen.tsx now renders '훈련 목록을 불러오지 못했어요' with the API error before the real '아직 시작한 훈련이 없어요' empty state.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Confirm existing user history was not physically deleted.
requirements_checklist.evidence: Mac Mini production DB inspection found active case 72 for junti7@gmail.com with status vp_training_day0 and many snapshots; older deleted cases are soft-deleted via status=deleted.

verification.name: edu app production bundle build
verification.result: tsc and vite build succeeded; dist assets generated.

verification.name: edu app lint
verification.result: eslint completed successfully with exit code 0.

verification.name: Mac Mini production DB check
